ohtani.title: Kyle Tucker drives in two runs in Dodgers' 8-3 win
ohtani.blurb: Kyle Tucker homers while driving in two runs, and Yoshinobu Yamamoto strikes out eight in the Dodgers' 8-3 win over the Astros

imanaga.title: Happ, Imanaga lead Cubs to 2-0 win
imanaga.blurb: Ian Happ crushes a home run and Shota Imanaga strikes out five in seven scoreless frames, leading the Cubs to a 2-0 win over the D-backs

suzuki.title: Michael Conforto walks it off in Cubs' win
suzuki.blurb: Michael Conforto hits a walk-off home run and Seiya Suzuki hits a three-run homer in the Cubs' 5-4 win over the Reds

yoshida.title: Jarren Duran hits a go-ahead homer in Red Sox's win
yoshida.blurb: Jarren Duran hits a go-ahead home run and Payton Tolle strikes out eight in the Red Sox's 5-4 win over the Tigers

okamoto.title: Ryan Vilade homers to power Rays' 5-1 win
okamoto.blurb: Ryan Vilade launches a three-run homer and Taylor Walls hits a two-run single to lead the Rays to a 5-1 win against the Blue Jays

murakami.title: Davis Martin strikes out 10 in White Sox's win
murakami.blurb: Davis Martin strikes out 10 and Munetaka Murakami hits his 14th home run in the White Sox's 6-0 win over the Angels
